pages.title: Read the Climate
pages.text: Temperature is enabled alongside thirst. Watch the HUD before long trips and change shelter, clothing, or equipment before exposure becomes an emergency.$(br2)Respawning does not grant temporary climate protection in this pack.

pages.title: Measuring Tools
pages.text: These live recipes provide tools for reading environmental and personal temperature conditions.

pages.title: Thermoregulator
pages.text: Build climate control into a permanent base rather than relying only on emergency consumables.
